name: Taken Together: Who Killed Lyric and Elizabeth?
original_name: Taken Together: Who Killed Lyric and Elizabeth?
overview: Dives into the haunting 2012 double abduction of two cousins, 10-year-old Lyric Cook-Morrissey and 8-year-old Elizabeth Collins, in Evansdale, Iowa. With over seven years of exclusive access and insider interviews.
